note_en: WebSearch/fetch-verified 2026 US macro release calendar, used by the signal-warsh scheduled task as a no-op guard: only run in 'event' mode on a date listed below (plus the day after FOMC decisions, for reaction/repricing follow-through), otherwise fall back to 'weekly' mode on Fridays or skip. Verified 2026-07-04 directly against the official schedule pages (not a search-summary paraphrase) — see verifiedVia. Re-verify before reusing past 2026-12-31.
note_zh: WebSearch/直接抓取核实的 2026 年美国宏观数据发布日历，供 signal-warsh 定时任务作 no-op 门禁：只有命中下列日期（含 FOMC 决议后一天，用于捕捉后续repricing）才跑 event 模式，否则周五走 weekly 模式，其余日期跳过。2026-07-04 直接核对官方发布日程页面（不是搜索引擎摘要转述）——来源见 verifiedVia。2026-12-31 之后复用前需重新核实。
pce_note_en: Only Jul-Dec 2026 populated (dates before today's WebSearch-verification date, 2026-07-04, are irrelevant to the forward-looking guard and weren't independently re-confirmed).
pce_note_zh: 只填了 7-12 月（核实日 2026-07-04 之前的日期对前瞻性门禁没有意义，未单独复核）。
fomc_note_en: sep=true meetings carry a Summary of Economic Projections (dot plot) + are typically the higher-weight ones for the hawk-dove compass. Every meeting (sep or not) has a 2:00 PM ET statement + 2:30 PM ET press conference.
fomc_note_zh: sep=true 的会议带点阵图(SEP)，对鹰鸽罗盘权重通常更高。无论是否 sep，每次会议都在美东下午 2:00 发声明 + 2:30 开新闻发布会。
